name: onchain-attestation

SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Base58-encoded Solana private key for signing attestations

BASE_PRIVATE_KEY.description: 0x-prefixed hex EVM private key for Base attestations

SOLANA_RPC_URL.description: Solana RPC endpoint (optional, defaults to public RPC)

BASE_RPC_URL.description: Base RPC endpoint (optional, defaults to public RPC)

title: On-Chain Attestation
description: Create cryptographic proofs of data on Solana and Base blockchains. Provides verifiable, immutable attestations for any Actor output, data, or workflow.
shortDescription: Blockchain attestation service for verifiable data provenance
